sub_pixel_system.notes: Space simulation with 3D flight physics; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Flight Control System
special_mechanics.description: 3D space flight physics for fighter and freighter piloting; rudder support added in this iteration

special_mechanics.name: Multi-Crew Vessel Control
special_mechanics.description: Player can pilot or operate turrets on larger craft like Millennium Falcon; AI controls unassigned positions

tier_notes: Tier 2: Space simulation game. Source material is encyclopedic overview with no quantitative physics parameters documented. Game focuses on flight mechanics and mission structure rather than precise movement values. No jump mechanics, gravity values, or sub-pixel systems are documented for this space combat simulator.
